textByHashes.b643b2172a90ab1e51c03d92e359c9d752fed6d2: I'm too old to fight. I'm afraid you'll have to kill that ogre by yourself.
textByHashes.a7f8c56d40e1c3ff2dc433416cbe2857f736dca1: You saved my life and my son's, I am eternally in your debt brave traveller.
textByHashes.c493598d09e2eacab8fa4b0d0f167de6d0707481: You saved my life and my son's. I am eternally in your debt brave traveller.
textByHashes.da80d76bd402912fc28b6c44cc65a13ec7ec105c: You've incurred the anger of Khazard yourself now. He won't let any of us go easily.
textByHashes.5c8df0982a71024039306957cd5bde3cf669998d: You may laugh, but the name of the General's 'pet' is feared by many in this land.
textByHashes.d76ca387ad1219b16ffc4610aa654a2720d32b83: I don't know, but I can't imagine he'll be happy with you now.
textByHashes.8cc3e5b0f4a4e414ebc7430685a81bf1b202f626: My thanks, we'll be ok now. I suggest you run too, General Khazard is mighty and his anger fearsome.
textByHashes.4a820f80015f81ba0f5a3ed9f351d8de89435523: Ignore him! You can do it!
